message:
fix(core): restore previous hot-path profile state in guard drop and update fast-path test docs

StatementReuseHotPathProfileGuard now saves the pre-guard enabled state
and restores it on drop instead of unconditionally disabling profiling.
Adds a test that verifies both the disabled-restore and enabled-preserve
cases. Updates fast_path_separation doc comments to reflect actual
semantics (path metrics vs strict fast/slow dichotomy).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
